# Quotes

- [Rin Liu](https://desyncthethird.github.io/)

  - > refine you bastard

    -- while plugging a goal in Cubical Agda

  - > this is bullshit there is no hcomp up here

    -- angrily staring at a whiteboard, standing on a chair

  - > Man, I Love Filling Cubes

    -- after successfully filling a cube in Cubical Agda
